kmo_interpretation: Meritorious - Variables have sufficient common variance for aggregation

bartlett_test.interpretation: Highly significant - Variables are correlated, not independent

pca_variance.pc1_interpretation: First PC explains 63.8% of variance, exceeds 60% OECD target

sensitivity_analysis.interpretation: Index is robust - Rankings stable across weighting methods

morans_i.interpretation: Significant spatial clustering - Geographic patterns matter
